items.claim: Ali lands less than three significant strikes per minute.
items.quote: He lands less than three strikes per minute, significant strikes per minute.

items.claim: Ali's last three fights have all gone to decision.
items.quote: His last three fights all gone to decision.

items.claim: Ali has shown no real power.
Mike Davis has 60% takedown defense due to specific context in two fights.
items.quote: Mike Davis's case, it's like you could look at, oh well, he's got 60% takedown def. Well, that's all because of two fights.

items.claim: Mike Davis is six feet tall at the weight class, making him a big guy.
items.quote: He's six feet tall at the weight class. Big guy.

items.claim: Mike Davis has far superior striking compared to Ali, with better pace, volume, and power.
items.quote: His striking is far superior than all of He's got better better pace, better volume, better power.

items.claim: Mike Davis is starting to slow down and get a little bit older.
items.quote: I do think Mike Davis is starting to slow down. He's starting to get a little bit older.

items.claim: Ali hasn't really shown much finishing ability.
items.quote: Ali hasn't really shown much finishing ability.
